text: I feel a sense of curiosity moving between these spaces. The first room, quiet and softly lit, offers calmness—almost like a waiting or transition area inviting reflection. Moving into the bright, visually stimulating display of research and discovery, I sense inspiration. Here, surrounded by words, screens, and creative energy, I feel an urge to question, to learn, and to wonder at the intersection of humanity and technology. The world seems full of possibilities and unknowns, and I am eager to contemplate its mysteries.
